embeds.description:
Level up by being active in chat to unlock permissions and earn exclusive roles. The more you engage, the more you unlock.

**VIP members and Nitro Boosters** receive all permission tiers immediately — no grind required.

fields.name: ⭐ Level Milestone Roles
fields.value:
🥇 **First Place** — #1 on the Leaderboard
💯 **Godlike** — Level 100
🔱 **Mythic** — Level 80
☯️ **Legend** — Level 60
🪄 **Ace** — Level 40
✴️ **Touch Grass** — Level 30
✨ **Good Member** — Level 20
😎 **Pro** — Level 15
💫 **Active** — Level 10
🌟 **Starter** — Level 5
⭐ **Newbie** — Level 1

fields.name: 🔓 Permission Unlocks
fields.value:
**Level 10+** — External Emojis + Sticker permissions
**Level 20+** — Link sharing + Embed permissions
**Level 30+** — Image posting permissions

💎 **VIP & Nitro Boosters** — All permissions unlocked immediately

footer.text: Stay active, level up, and unlock more of SnowHaven.
